augment.augmented.crafting.desc: Adds a portable crafting grid to the backpack
augment.augmented.crafting.select_to_cra: Select an item to craft from the grid below
augment.augmented.swapping.desc: Automatically swaps the held tool for one inside the backpack that matches the block being mined.
augment.augmented.experience.desc:
Stores up to 30 levels and returns it to the player after death.
Can store 60 levels when used with §dRecall§r.
augment.backpacked.experience.title: Stored EXP
augment.augmented.feeding.desc:
Auto feeds the player from the backpack.
Can be configured to prioritize feeding based on nutrition or saturation.
Only one priority can be selected.
augment.backpacked.feeding.nutrition.too: Prioritize Hunger as criteria to consume food. Food will only be consumed if hunger is less than the foods nutrition value.
augment.backpacked.feeding.saturation.to: Prioritize Fullness as criteria to consume food. Food will only be consumed if fullness is less than the foods saturation value.
